steps.assistant_text: Quad4 reader accessor template, -O0 variant per feedback_uso_accessor_o0_variant.md. Split arcproc_uso.c into three files: arcproc_uso.c (0x0-0x50 INCLUDE_ASM func_00000000), arcproc_uso_o0_50.c (0x50-0xB4 this accessor at -O0), and arcproc_uso_tail1.c (0xB4+). Same pattern as bootup_uso_o0_* files.

metadata.verification: Verified with objdiff — arcproc_uso_o0_50 unit at 100%.
